{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Gladstone Imperial Park
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gladstone Imperial Park]] is located across from the residence [[Maxwell]]'s family has owned for generations.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Gladstone Park is a location near where [[Rudeus Maxwell]]'s home was found.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
